use_cases: Displaying book products in an e-commerce catalog with customizable styling
Creating visual book collections in media library or reading applications
Showcasing digital publications with branded book cover cards
ai_summary: A stylized book component with 3D perspective rendering, customizable colors, illustrations, and text properties. Supports simple and stripe variants with responsive width handling. Perfect for displaying books in media libraries, e-commerce product grids, or reading applications with a polished, dimensional card appearance.
